nasb.text: “Yet even now,” declares the Lord, “Return to Me with all your heart, And with fasting, weeping and mourning;

esv.text: “Yet even now,” declares the Lord, “return to me with all your heart, with fasting, with weeping, and with mourning;

cnv.text: 耶和華說： “現在雖然如此， 你們仍要全心全意， 以禁食、哭泣、哀號，歸向我。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “现在，你们要禁食、哭泣、哀号， 全心回转归向我。”
